starterTools.name: list_linear_issues
starterTools.description: List your assigned Linear issues, optionally filtered by team.

inputSchema.name: teamId
inputSchema.description: Team ID to filter by (leave blank for all teams)

executionConfig.body: {"query":"{ issues(first: {{first}}) { nodes { id identifier title state { name } assignee { name } priority } } }"}

starterTools.name: search_linear_issues
starterTools.description: Search Linear issues by title keyword.

inputSchema.name: query
inputSchema.description: Text to search for in issue titles

executionConfig.body: {"query":"{ issueSearch(query: \"{{query}}\", first: 20) { nodes { id identifier title state { name } assignee { name } url } } }"}

starterTools.name: create_linear_issue
starterTools.description: Create a new issue in a Linear team.

executionConfig.body: {"query":"mutation { issueCreate(input: { teamId: \"{{teamId}}\", title: \"{{title}}\", description: \"{{description}}\" }) { success issue { id identifier title url } } }"}
